name: ShareClick: en düşük input-lag'li software KVM transport optimizasyonu

description: Baseline: UDP input transport (postcard-encoded, seq-numbered, dedicated blocking socket). Loopback RTT median 11.75µs, one-way ~5.88µs — transport overhead negligible, LAN RTT will dominate.

asi.hypothesis: Dedicated blocking UDP socket + compact postcard framing gives microsecond-scale transport overhead
asi.finding: 5.88us one-way on loopback; transport is not the bottleneck, real gains will come from OS capture->inject path and coalescing at high polling rates
asi.arch: hybrid transport: UDP input channel + reliable bulk channel; seq numbers drop stragglers to avoid head-of-line blocking
asi.next_action_hint: implement input capture (macOS CGEventTap/rdev) + emulation (enigo), then edge-switching and coalescing
